pipeline.title: Four-Stage Pipeline (Hover for details · Click to navigate)

stages.label: Analyze
stages.desc: LLM infers pain points · keywords · platforms
stages.hoverDesc: User submits product description → Ollama/Gamma 4 infers audience pain points, generates 20+ platform search keywords, identifies competitors

stages.label: Scan
stages.hoverDesc: 11 Scanner types cover Reddit/YouTube/Google/Amazon/Quora/Twitter/HN/SO/App Store/Review Sites + multilingual local platforms

stages.label: Mine
stages.hoverDesc: LLM pain-point extraction → relevance matching → 5-axis validation (community authenticity · monetization potential · search volume · negative review correlation · technical depth) → scoring & grading

stages.label: Reply
stages.hoverDesc: Ollama generates value-added replies + injects tracking links → human/auto review → multi-platform publishing → click/conversion tracking

metrics.label: Platforms
metrics.hoverDesc: Full coverage of major English platforms + Spanish/Portuguese/Japanese/Korean/Russian local platforms

metrics.label: Languages
metrics.hoverDesc: English, Spanish, Portuguese, Japanese, Korean, Russian

metrics.label: DB Tables
metrics.hoverDesc: Core business + reply tracking + billing + audit + funnel + partner — 6 table groups

metrics.label: Edge Fns
metrics.hoverDesc: Covering project analysis, reply publishing, billing deduction, partner revenue share, and more

background.title: Background & Goals
background.subtitle: From passive exposure to active engagement — joining the conversation with genuine, valuable content the moment users signal their pain.

problem.title: Traditional Acquisition Pain Points
points: Search ads keyword bidding: CPC keeps climbing in an endless bidding spiral
Display / feed ads: Force-feeding impressions to people who haven't expressed a need — low conversion
KOL campaigns: High upfront cost, unpredictable ROI
Core problem: Can't find people who are actively looking for a solution

solution.title: The MOTA Approach
points: Proactively discover real users who are publicly discussing problems and seeking help
Join the conversation under pain-signal posts with genuinely useful content
Product links appear as a natural extension, not hard-sell advertising
Pay only for actual results (clicks / conversions) — zero waste

workflow.label: Onboard Product
workflow.detail: Customer provides product name, description copy, product URL, and target market languages in the user dashboard — system auto-creates the project

workflow.label: AI Analysis
workflow.detail: Ollama/Gamma 4 analyzes the product → infers audience pain points → generates multi-platform search keywords → creates tasks and enqueues them

workflow.label: Full-Web Scan
workflow.detail: Scanner Agent cluster scans Reddit/YouTube/Google/Amazon/Quora/Twitter and 20+ other platforms 24/7 to find real posts discussing related problems

workflow.label: Generate Reply
workflow.detail: AI generates a helpful reply + injects tracking links (mota_pid + mota_ref + UTM); optional human review before publishing

workflow.label: Track & Bill
workflow.detail: Tracking link clicked → funnel_events logged → Prepaid: real-time credit deduction / PAYG: end-of-month settlement → Admin can adjust invoices

goals.title: Product-First
goals.desc: Start from the customer's product/service — the system reverse-engineers target audience pain-point profiles. No research prompts required.
details: User only needs to provide product name, description, and URL
LLM automatically infers domain tags, pain points, competitors, keywords
Generated tasks cover search queries across all platforms

goals.title: Full-Platform Coverage
goals.desc: Major English platforms + Spanish/Portuguese/Japanese/Korean/Russian local platforms — global market reach.
details: Local platforms: Taringa!/Reclame Aqui/知恵袋/지식iN/Pikabu etc.

goals.title: Genuinely Valuable Replies
goals.desc: AI replies must contain truly useful content. Product links are a natural extension, not ads — minimizing ban risk.
details: Prompt rules: no direct advertising tone

goals.title: Pay for Performance
goals.desc: Billed per actual posted reply click/conversion. Admins can apply discount adjustments to invoices.
details: Prepaid: top-up Credits with real-time deduction
PAYG: monthly accumulation via Stripe card charge
CPA: deep conversion events with weighted billing

goals.title: Three-Tier Architecture
goals.desc: Portal (public site), User Dashboard (project & billing management), Admin Dashboard (global operations).
details: Admin Dashboard: Tanstack Table + full RBAC

methods.name: Negative Search
methods.detail: Find posts with a 'frustration' tone — users who've tried generic solutions but failed are prime candidates for alternatives

methods.name: Community Q&A Radar
methods.detail: Capture unanswered or poorly-answered questions where the product can be a better answer

methods.name: Video Comment Mining
methods.detail: Comment sections under competitor tutorials are a natural 'what's not good enough' database

methods.name: Negative Review Targeting
methods.detail: Competitor negative reviews = potential target users for our product

methods.name: Real-Time Sentiment
methods.detail: Monitor keyword complaints in real time — be first to engage

methods.name: Technical Q&A
methods.detail: High-view unanswered technical questions are ideal for tool/SaaS products

methods.name: Cross-Source Validation
methods.detail: Same problem appearing on multiple platforms = stronger signal, higher match confidence

methods.name: Multilingual Local
methods.platforms: Taringa! · Reclame Aqui · 知恵袋 etc.
methods.detail: Cover Spanish/Portuguese/Japanese/Korean/Russian local communities to expand acquisition geography

analysis.title: Product Analysis Engine
analysis.subtitle: User submits product description → LLM infers target audience pain points, search keywords, and target platforms.

promptFields.desc: Core pain point in one sentence

analysis.triggerNote: Trigger: projects INSERT → on_project_created Edge Function

scanners.title: Scanner Agents & Platform Skills
scanners.subtitle: 10+ platform scanners + 10+ platform skill interfaces covering English and 5 native-language communities.

mining.title: Data Mining Engine
mining.subtitle: Four-stage pipeline: batch classification → pain-point extraction → dedup aggregation → 5-axis validation.

pipeline.label: Gemini Flash Aggregate
pipeline.desc: Merge similar pain points, compute frequency

reply.title: Auto-Reply Agent
reply.subtitle: Generate genuine, valuable community replies that naturally introduce the product. Multiple channels: direct reply, GitHub bridge, internal post, customer collaboration.
promptRules: Provide at least one actionable free suggestion
Naturally introduce product + tracking link at end
Forbidden: Buy now / Check out / Amazing product

channels.name: Direct Reply
channels.desc: Post AI replies directly on YouTube, Twitter, Reddit etc.

channels.name: GitHub Bridge
channels.desc: Create GitHub repos for HN/SO where promotion is banned; embed tracking links in README

channels.name: Internal Post
channels.desc: Publish standalone solution posts on platforms that restrict external links

channels.name: Customer Collab
channels.desc: Customer adds context → AI drafts → edit → system-send or manual publish

partner.title: Partner Ecosystem
partner.subtitle: Recruit platform users & creators. AI-driven collaboration from discovery to payout. True AI-employs-humans model.

programs.name: Partner Program §4.6.11
programs.flow: Apply → Review → Task assignment → Per-click revenue share

programs.name: Creator Co-creation §4.6.12
programs.flow: AI discovers → AI invites → Creative brief → Creator publishes → AI settles

aiStages.label: Discover
aiStages.desc: Scan platforms for high-influence users → creator_leads

payments.desc: Fiat direct transfer · monthly Cron · $10 min payout

erd.title: Database Schema
erd.subtitle: 21 tables · grouped by module · all with RLS enabled.

edge.title: Edge Functions & RLS
edge.subtitle: 11 Edge Functions covering the full business pipeline · all tables with row-level security.

functions.name: manage_github_repo / publish_platform_post
functions.desc: GitHub repo mgmt / Internal post publishing

rlsGroups.tables: tasks, mentions, scan_logs, pain_points, validations, reply_logs, funnel_events

fraudRules.desc: Same IP · 10 min · same project > 3 clicks

billing.title: Billing System
billing.subtitle: Four billing models · flexible adjustments · anti-fraud protection.

models.name: Prepaid Packages
models.desc: Buy credit packs, consume per click, never expire

models.name: PAYG (Pay-as-you-go)
models.desc: Month-end actual click tally, Stripe auto-charge

models.name: Partner Revenue Share
models.desc: Client pays → platform cut → partner per-tier share

dashboard.title: Dashboard Design
dashboard.subtitle: User Dashboard · Admin Dashboard · Partner Portal — three separate panels.

panels.name: User Dashboard /dashboard
modules: Overview (project status · credit balance · weekly clicks)

panels.name: Admin Dashboard /admin
modules: Reply Queue (review · AI rewrite · batch approve)
Billing (package CRUD · CPA weights · per-user pricing)
Partner & Creator Mgmt (lead pool · tasks · settlement)

panels.name: Partner Portal /partner
modules: Task Center (task list · AI draft · tracking links)

dataSources.tables: projects, tasks, mentions, reply_queue, reply_logs, funnel_events, competitor_reports, user_billing, credit_transactions, bill_periods
All 21 tables + admin_audit_logs + creator_leads + partners + partner_tasks + partner_earnings

schedule.title: Scheduling & Operations
schedule.subtitle: Fully automated scheduling · CLI management · quality control configuration.

Yahoo! 知恵袋, Kakaku.com, Amazon JP
